title: The Pillars of a Reliable Human-Centred AI System
description: A flowchart illustrating the four interconnected core elements that define a reliable AI system from a human-centred perspective, showing how they build upon one another.
relationships: Robustness & Safety forms the foundational layer, ensuring the system is secure and functions correctly under varying conditions. Fairness & Bias Mitigation and Transparency & Explainability are built upon this foundation, working in parallel to ensure equitable and understandable outcomes. Finally, Accountability & Governance sits atop, encompassing and governing the entire system to ensure responsibility for its actions and decisions.
